title: leonurus cardiaca subsp. intermedius
intro: Leonurus cardiaca subsp. intermedius, also known as Motherwort intermediate, is a subspecies of the medicinal herb Leonurus cardiaca. This plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Leonurus cardiaca subsp. intermedius include reducing anxiety and stress, regulating menstrual cycles, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The herbal preparations of Motherwort intermediate typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to supplements.
